summary: Global Click Integrity Sweep (P1) - Production hardening audit completed. All three fixed dead buttons verified working: Gallery Like (API call), Gallery Share (clipboard copy), SeriesTimeline Watch (handleResumeEpisode). Dashboard hero z-index fixes verified across mobile/tablet/desktop viewports. All share URLs and navigation flows working correctly.

gallery_immersive_viewer.like_button: PASS - Has real onClick handler that calls /api/gallery/view API (line 426-434)
gallery_immersive_viewer.share_button: PASS - Has real onClick handler that copies URL to clipboard (line 439-451)

series_timeline.watch_button: PASS - Has onClick that calls handleResumeEpisode (line 303)

dashboard_hero.mobile_375px: PASS - Continue Story and Remix buttons visible and accessible
dashboard_hero.z_index_fixes: PASS - pointer-events-none on hook text (line 156), z-20 on button container (line 159), z-[5] on dots (line 213)

share_urls.copy_link: PASS - SharePromptModal has Link button for copying URL

landing_page.story_cards: PASS - Continue Story buttons navigate to /experience
landing_page.ctas: PASS - Create Your First Video and Watch Examples buttons found

public_creation.continue_cta: PASS - Navigates to /experience (intentional for viral 1-click flow)

profile_page.tabs: PASS - My Space, My Jobs, Profile Settings, Security, Notifications tabs present
profile_page.buttons: PASS - Sign out, 55 Credits, Download buttons functional

my_space_page.in_progress: PASS - In Progress section with 10 items

deep_link.invalid_project: PASS - Shows 'Could not load the project' error for invalid IDs

dead_buttons_check.empty_onclick: PASS - No buttons with empty onClick found
dead_buttons_check.href_hash_links: PASS - No dead href='#' links found

code_verification.gallery_like_button: Lines 426-434: onClick handler calls fetch to /api/gallery/view with type: 'like'
code_verification.gallery_share_button: Lines 439-451: onClick handler copies shareUrl to clipboard and shows toast

context_for_next_testing_agent: All P1 click integrity fixes verified. Gallery ImmersiveViewer Like/Share buttons have real handlers. SeriesTimeline Watch button calls handleResumeEpisode. Dashboard hero z-index fixes working across all viewports. No dead buttons or href='#' links found. Share functionality working via SharePromptModal with Message/Post/Story/Link options.
